reports.title: Reports center
reports.subtitle: Pinansyal at operasyon na ulat, may role awareness. Lahat ng numero ay clinic-scoped, Asia/Manila, at sumusunod sa staff permissions.
reports.statScopeBody: Naka-filter ang export at table sa clinic kung saan ka naka-sign in.
reports.statTzBody: Buckets, PDF period, at SMS window ay naka-align sa PH business time.
reports.statAccessBody: Sensitibong ledger ay nasa ADMIN / finance path habang umuunlad ang API.
reports.cardArDesc: Outstanding ayon sa aging bucket, pasyente, at OR reference — para sa follow-up at finance review.
reports.cardDashDesc: Revenue trend, appointment mix, pila, pending HMO, buwanang PDF.
reports.cardDashBullet1: Mga chart na may empty-state guide
reports.pipelineBody: Lilitaw dito ang mga module bilang report tiles — parehong responsive shell at export.
reports.pipelineLi1: CSV / Excel packs para sa finance close
reports.footerLead: Buwanang PDF: gamitin ang year/month sa dashboard, i-download kapag tama na ang total.
reports.footerTrail: Custom cut? I-track sa clinic playbook — may traceability sa invoice at appointment IDs.
